site.title: Cloud Harbor
site.description: Cloud Harbor is a vendor preparing to sell at TWBC. This site collects booth details, product information, and upcoming updates.

hero.title: Cloud Harbor, a vendor preparing for TWBC
hero.intro: We are organizing booth details, planned products, and launch updates so visitors can quickly understand what Cloud Harbor is preparing.
hero.profileRole: TWBC Vendor / Product Prep / Booth Sales
hero.profileText: Cloud Harbor is preparing to sell at TWBC. Product details, booth information, and updates will be collected here as the event gets closer.

about.title: Cloud Harbor gathers the things we love into a booth of creative and practical goods, ready to meet everyone at TWBC.
about.body: This site will keep planned products, booth details, and future updates in one place. Whether visitors want to preview items before the event, check prices, or return later for new listings, they can quickly find Cloud Harbor's latest information here.

footer.tagline: Preparing a vendor booth for TWBC
footer.quote: "Bring what we love to the booth, carefully."
